titleStmt.title: SII 23.574: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 574. (A.R. No. 574 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 6th tier of the same base Kulōttuṅga year 4 (Plava)

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription with stones peeled off to a great extent in the middle. It seems to register a gift of land to provide for offerings to Śokkapperumāḷ by cheyya Śivapūdaṉ Madusūdaṉaṉ of Kōyambēḍu in Māṅgāṭṭu-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvaṉaśakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4- Āvatāṉa plava m peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattu nāḷ Atirāje ndramaṇṭalattu meṟpākkaināṭṭu nirantanūrāṉa Akarabrahmadeyam śrī kulottuṅkacoḻac catu ḻamaṇṭalattu māṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭuk koyampeṭṭuc ceyya civapūtaṉ matucūtaṉaṉ
nāyakaṉ Iccokkapperumāḷukku Iṉṟu tuṭaṅki Ācandratāra kam Irutūmpu Ariciyāl Iraṇ Iraṇṭum puṟanilattil niṉṟum vanta śrīvaiṣṇa varkaḷ vaḻinaṭaiyākap peṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ituk kuṭalāka Ivvūril veta śrīdevivatikkuk kiḻakku maturāntaka vāykkālukku teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟpataviyilStops here. The continuation is found below No. 586 with statement to that effect. kiḻil paṭṭikaiyil Eḻutiṉa varikkuṟai
vaṭamelaikkālil vaṭakkaṭaiya kamukantoṭṭaṅ kuḻi 100 nūṟṟukkum Aṉṟāṭu naṭakkiṟa Aippaci tukavaiyil naṉmāṭai Irupa Ik kamukan toṭṭaṅ kuḻi nūṟum śudthatirthamākak koṇṭu Iccokkap perumāḷukku Ippaṭi tiruppoṉakam ṭaiyāvatākavum śāsanam paṇ ṇikkuṭutteṉ Icceyya cipūtaṉ maticūtaṉaṉ vāṉavanāyakaṉ svastiśrī naṉṟāka .
Digital edition of SII 23.574 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
